affordances.description: Bootstrap call — must be the first rpc on a new pipe connection. Send plugin_id, manifest SHA-256, contract version, and declared capabilities; the host accepts or rejects. Every session-auth affordance requires this first, plus the x-plugin-id metadata header on each subsequent call.

verified.detail: answered per contract with rejection: "Plugin vibe-access-verify is not installed."

overrides.description: Bootstrap call — must be the first rpc on a new pipe connection. Send plugin_id, manifest SHA-256, contract version, and declared capabilities; the host accepts or rejects. Every session-auth affordance requires this first, plus the x-plugin-id metadata header on each subsequent call.

affordances.description: Read RoRoRo's version and multi-instance state (On / Off / Error). Free read — no handshake or consent required; the per-user pipe ACL is the only gate.

overrides.description: Read RoRoRo's version and multi-instance state (On / Off / Error). Free read — no handshake or consent required; the per-user pipe ACL is the only gate.

affordances.description: Read the running Roblox clients RoRoRo launched: account id (Guid), Roblox user id, display name, PID, and place id/name from presence tracking (0 / empty means unknown — treat as no game info, never a game named ""). Free read — no handshake or consent required.

overrides.description: Read the running Roblox clients RoRoRo launched: account id (Guid), Roblox user id, display name, PID, and place id/name from presence tracking (0 / empty means unknown — treat as no game info, never a game named ""). Free read — no handshake or consent required.

affordances.description: Server-streaming subscription: one event per account launch (ids, display name, PID, timestamp). Place identity often lags at launch time — re-query get-running-accounts for fresh identity. Requires consent to capability host.events.account-launched.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.events.account-launched'.)

overrides.description: Server-streaming subscription: one event per account launch (ids, display name, PID, timestamp). Place identity often lags at launch time — re-query get-running-accounts for fresh identity. Requires consent to capability host.events.account-launched.

affordances.description: Server-streaming subscription: one event per account exit (account id, Roblox user id, PID, exit timestamp). Requires consent to capability host.events.account-exited.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.events.account-exited'.)

overrides.description: Server-streaming subscription: one event per account exit (account id, Roblox user id, PID, exit timestamp). Requires consent to capability host.events.account-exited.

affordances.description: Server-streaming subscription: multi-instance mutex state transitions (On / Off / Error). Requires consent to capability host.events.mutex-state-changed.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.events.mutex-state-changed'.)

overrides.description: Server-streaming subscription: multi-instance mutex state transitions (On / Off / Error). Requires consent to capability host.events.mutex-state-changed.

affordances.description: Command RoRoRo to launch a saved account by account_id. The cookie → auth-ticket → roblox-player: pipeline runs entirely host-side; no credentials ever cross the pipe. Returns ok / failure_reason / PID. Launches a real Roblox client — do not call casually. Requires consent to capability host.commands.request-launch.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.commands.request-launch'.)

overrides.description: Command RoRoRo to launch a saved account by account_id. The cookie → auth-ticket → roblox-player: pipeline runs entirely host-side; no credentials ever cross the pipe. Returns ok / failure_reason / PID. Launches a real Roblox client — do not call casually. Requires consent to capability host.commands.request-launch.

affordances.description: Launch a saved account into a specific server: pass a share_url (private-server share link, PlaceLauncher accessCode URL, roblox.com/share token, public game URL, or bare place id) or follow_user_id to follow a friend (Roblox permission-checks the follow). Launches a real Roblox client. Requires consent to capability host.commands.launch-target.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.commands.launch-target'.)

overrides.description: Launch a saved account into a specific server: pass a share_url (private-server share link, PlaceLauncher accessCode URL, roblox.com/share token, public game URL, or bare place id) or follow_user_id to follow a friend (Roblox permission-checks the follow). Launches a real Roblox client. Requires consent to capability host.commands.launch-target.

affordances.description: Read the most recently launched private server: ready-to-share URL, place name/id, launch timestamp. present=false when no private server has been launched this session. Requires consent to capability host.queries.current-server.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.queries.current-server'.)

overrides.description: Read the most recently launched private server: ready-to-share URL, place name/id, launch timestamp. present=false when no private server has been launched this session. Requires consent to capability host.queries.current-server.

affordances.description: Read per-account idle state: last-activity timestamp and seconds since, per running account. Timestamps only — never input contents. Requires consent to capability host.queries.account-activity.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.queries.account-activity'.)

overrides.description: Read per-account idle state: last-activity timestamp and seconds since, per running account. Timestamps only — never input contents. Requires consent to capability host.queries.account-activity.

affordances.description: Credit an account as active after the plugin acts on its window — the host's idle heuristic can't see plugin-synthesized input, so keep-alive plugins call this to stop idle warnings from misfiring. Requires consent to capability host.commands.mark-account-active.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.commands.mark-account-active'.)

overrides.description: Credit an account as active after the plugin acts on its window — the host's idle heuristic can't see plugin-synthesized input, so keep-alive plugins call this to stop idle warnings from misfiring. Requires consent to capability host.commands.mark-account-active.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.commands.stop-accounts'.)

overrides.description: Close Roblox clients RoRoRo launched, by account. Empty account_ids means EVERY tracked account. Graceful close (CloseMainWindow) first, hard kill only as fallback; untracked processes are unreachable. DESTRUCTIVE - closes real Roblox clients and any unsaved in-game progress is lost. stopped_count means the stop was issued, not that the client exited: poll get-running-accounts until the account disappears before relaunching it. Requires consent to capability host.commands.stop-accounts.

affordances.description: Add an item to RoRoRo's tray menu (label, tooltip, enabled). Returns an opaque UIHandle for update-ui / remove-ui; clicks stream back via the plugin's OnUIInteraction callback. Requires consent to capability host.ui.tray-menu.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.ui.tray-menu'.)

overrides.description: Add an item to RoRoRo's tray menu (label, tooltip, enabled). Returns an opaque UIHandle for update-ui / remove-ui; clicks stream back via the plugin's OnUIInteraction callback. Requires consent to capability host.ui.tray-menu.

affordances.description: Add a badge to each saved-account row (text, optional hex color — defaults to brand cyan, tooltip). Returns a UIHandle. Requires consent to capability host.ui.row-badge.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.ui.row-badge'.)

overrides.description: Add a badge to each saved-account row (text, optional hex color — defaults to brand cyan, tooltip). Returns a UIHandle. Requires consent to capability host.ui.row-badge.

affordances.description: Add a status panel to the main window (title + basic-markdown body: bold, italic, lists). Returns a UIHandle. Requires consent to capability host.ui.status-panel.

verified.detail: auth-gate-held (PermissionDenied: Plugin 'vibe-access-verify' has not been granted 'host.ui.status-panel'.)

overrides.description: Add a status panel to the main window (title + basic-markdown body: bold, italic, lists). Returns a UIHandle. Requires consent to capability host.ui.status-panel.

affordances.description: Update a UI element this plugin created, addressed by UIHandle (menu item, row badge, or status panel spec). No capability entry — gated downstream by handle ownership: only the creating plugin's handles are accepted.

verified.detail: handle-gate-held (PermissionDenied: UI handle 'va-bogus-handle' is not owned by plugin 'vibe-access-verify'.)

overrides.description: Update a UI element this plugin created, addressed by UIHandle (menu item, row badge, or status panel spec). No capability entry — gated downstream by handle ownership: only the creating plugin's handles are accepted.

affordances.description: Remove a UI element this plugin created, addressed by UIHandle. Gated downstream by handle ownership.

verified.detail: handle-gate-held (PermissionDenied: UI handle 'va-bogus-handle' is not owned by plugin 'vibe-access-verify'.)

overrides.description: Remove a UI element this plugin created, addressed by UIHandle. Gated downstream by handle ownership.
